case_title: BRITTON, YVONNE A. VS CURTIS, MARIO

docket_entries.description: WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT CURTIS, MARIO
